scope: uncommitted working tree on fix/issue-0001-crlf-frontmatter vs main (HEAD 22fe74d30c210901643663561167d38de34d2922)

ac_results.note: parseFrontmatter normalizeNewlines at entry; deep-equal for LF/CRLF/lone-CR; no trailing CR
parseAcTable normalizeNewlines at entry; parseReviewBy/extractReferences receive only pre-normalized cells from ac.rows (all call sites traced and confirmed)
POSIX-normalized rel at main scan source; d.path renderers clean; byte-identical on POSIX. Windows residual in Orphans section (WARNING-1, pre-existing)
CRLF fixture corpus buckets correctly; Legacy(0); RED-proof confirmed
.gitattributes both lines present; existing rules unchanged
Report-only stderr guard: threshold >50% AND >1 correct; no exit-code change; positive/negative control both correct
Suite green except known pre-existing test_index_continue_on_error; docs-audit CLEAN; index idempotent; SPEC-0006 no regression

findings.message: Orphans section uses d.rel from scanAuditDocs() without POSIX normalization — backslash paths on Windows land in docs/INDEX.md
findings.breaking_input: Windows checkout with orphan docs: d.rel = path.relative(root, full) returns backslash-separated paths, appearing as-is in the Orphans section of docs/INDEX.md
findings.fix: In docs-audit-core.mjs:136 change `const rel = path.relative(root, full)` to `const rel = path.relative(root, full).split(path.sep).join('/')`

findings.message: findOpenDecisionMarker receives unnormalized content and splits on \n — residual CRLF exposure not in SPEC-0007 scope
findings.fix: Pass normalizeNewlines(content) to findOpenDecisionMarker at docs-audit-core.mjs:306

findings.message: TEST-006 negative control fails both guard conditions simultaneously; no test for each condition individually
normalizeNewlines exported (widens API); intentional for testability
findings.fix: No change needed; noted for documentation

adversarial_focus.1_parseReviewBy_extractReferences: CLEAN — all call sites receive pre-normalized cells from ac.rows; no raw CRLF content reaches either function
adversarial_focus.2_posix_path_normalization: PARTIAL — main scan loop and d.path renderers fixed; Orphans section d.rel not normalized (WARNING-1, pre-existing, Windows-only)
adversarial_focus.3_legacy_ratio_guard: CLEAN — threshold >0.5 correct; floor >1 correct; stderr only; no exit-code change; division-by-zero not possible
adversarial_focus.4_normalizeNewlines_order: CLEAN — CRLF first then lone-CR; no double-collapse or line-drop
adversarial_focus.5_spec0006_regression: CLEAN — no regression to deferred section, zero-section invariant, or open-decision guard
